patterns_recognized: D-grade picks with both SP-edge-against AND PQI-against have gone directionally wrong 7-of-9 times (78%) through 5/21 — reliably flag as expected-wrong direction.
HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD) is EV-protective but directionally neutral (~50%); never override the cap regardless of F-signal conviction.
Stage 1/2 delta > 0.20 + pick side has WORSE bullpen (positive hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap) = structurally broken bullpen-carry thesis — DOWNGRADE when elevated.
C-grade GOLD CONFIRM on F3-alone without SP quality support lost the 5/21 sole staked pick (WSH 2-1); F3-only C-grade picks without SP/PQI support should be DOWNGRADE, not CONFIRM.

HOU @ CHC.reasoning: CHC picked at 60.4% full game with F3 swing-take (938.3) as sole signal. HARD CAP 10 fired per pipeline (pick_prob=0.540 assertion); CONFIRM rescues back to pre-cap B (score=2). No fair_prob available for market validation. CHC lineup (Bregman .832 career vs RHP, Happ, Suzuki) faces Arrighetti — CHC batter BvP vs Arrighetti is SMALL_SAMPLE only (shrunk ~0.617). Low-conviction directional CONFIRM; non-staking.

CLE @ PHI.reasoning: PHI picked at 52.5% with strong supporting signals: PQI +35.6 confirms, SP edge 1.65 xERA (Sanchez over Williams). HARD CAP 1 fires on -12.7pp negative edge — market prices PHI much higher than model implies (fair_prob=0.652). PHI lineup (Turner, Schwarber, Harper) is quality. BvP all SMALL_SAMPLE with no OWNER/WEAK_VS flags. Non-staking pick; CONFIRM direction.

TB @ NYY.reasoning: PENDING_SP_DATA hard-stop: Gerrit Cole has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date; SP quality is unquantifiable. Protocol correctly applied regardless of other signals. NYY lineup has Yandy Diaz with 48PA vs Cole (LOTS_OF_HISTORY, shrunk 0.815), but without Cole's current Statcast profile the game cannot be scored. No pick issued.

PIT @ TOR.reasoning: D-grade (-2) with dual signals opposing PIT: Gausman's SP edge 1.59 xERA dominates Chandler, and PQI delta=+20.5 favors TOR's late-game profile. Market prices PIT at only 38.0% (fair_prob) vs model's 53.7%, a -15.75pp gap confirming market skepticism. D-grade dual-signal opposition has been directionally wrong ~78% of the time per 5/18-5/21 postgame record. SKIP is correct.

MIN @ BOS.reasoning: D-grade (-2) with both primary signals against MIN: SP edge 0.64 xERA against MIN (Tolle slight xERA disadvantage vs Prielipp) and PQI delta=+20.7 opposing MIN's late-game profile. fair_prob=0.409 below 0.42 staking threshold. Model probability near coin-flip (50.5%). Both SPs appear to be young/thin MLB starters. SKIP is correct with dual signal opposition.

NYM @ MIA.reasoning: D-grade (-2) with multiple headwinds against MIA: SP edge 2.05 xERA opposing (Myers > Perez), PQI delta=-29.3 strong against MIA late-game, confidence_downgrade=True, Stage 1/2 delta=0.12. MIA full-game win probability is barely 50.1% while losing F5 at ~62% — a pure bullpen-carry thesis on a team with structural disadvantages. NYM's Soto and Bichette are quality bats. SKIP is clearly correct.

DET @ BAL.reasoning: CAP 10 fired per pipeline (pick_prob=0.546 assertion). CONFIRM rescues to pre-cap B (score=2). Jack Flaherty anchors BAL as a proven SP; PQI delta=+10.5 confirms BAL's late-game edge. No fair_prob available for market validation. DET sending Keegan Akin (journeyman) against BAL's lineup (Henderson, Rutschman, Alonso, Pete Alonso) is a favorable matchup. Low-conviction CONFIRM; non-staking.

WSH @ ATL.reasoning: Multiple structural headwinds: Stage 1/2 delta=0.2213 (largest on slate) requires ATL's bullpen to carry from a big F5 lead, but ATL's HL bullpen is WORSE than WSH's (gap=+0.0214). WSH has 2 OWNERs vs Elder in top order (Garcia Jr. shrunk 0.804, Abrams shrunk 0.797). confidence_downgrade=True, acute_roster stress flag, Elder is small-sample (min_pa=93). Already B-/non-staking; DOWNGRADE to SKIP reflects broken bullpen-carry thesis and OWNER-level WSH BvP threat.

SEA @ KC.reasoning: D-grade (-3) with triple signals against KC: SP 1.27 xERA (Gilbert >> Cameron), PQI delta=-26.0, team quality negative. Stage 1/2 delta=0.1977 — KC loses F5 at 58.5% then needs total bullpen reversal. Interesting that KC has multiple OWNERs vs Gilbert (Witt Jr. shrunk 0.947, Perez shrunk 0.920, Pasquantino shrunk 0.774), but BvP OWNER context is qualitative color only and cannot override triple-signal D-grade opposition. SKIP confirmed.

LAD @ MIL.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires on -0.26pp essentially-zero negative edge. Both Henderson (MIL SP, min_pa=71) and Wrobleski (LAD SP) are thin-sample starters with no reliable BvP data — all NO_DATA for both sides. confidence_downgrade=True adds caution. Near-coin-flip pick (50.3%) with negligible edge; CAP 1 correctly prevents elevation. LAD carries a world-class lineup (Ohtani, Betts, Freeman, Tucker). Non-staking CONFIRM.

TEX @ LAA.reasoning: PENDING_SP_DATA hard-stop: listed SP has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date, making the game unscoreable. Protocol correctly applied. LAA lineup includes Trout and Neto with some positive BvP profiles in small samples, but without the SP's Statcast profile the model cannot produce a grade. No pick issued.

COL @ ARI.reasoning: CAP 2 (F3>1000 + home>65% without elite opposing SP) and CAP 7 (bullpen gap +0.0041) correctly demoted from pre-cap A (5) to B- (1). ARI directional case remains sound: F1 xera_gap=2.73 + F3=2014, Soroka's xERA=7.4 is catastrophic vs Sugano, ARI at 78.5%. PLATINUM tier historically ~43% hit rate requires extra scrutiny but model_prob=0.785 is correctly outside staking range. Bullpen_fatigue flag noted. Non-staking CONFIRM.

OAK @ SD.reasoning: D-grade (-2) with dual signals against SD: Buehler SP edge 1.26 xERA superior to Springs, PQI delta=-8.2 opposing SD's late-game profile. confidence_downgrade=True, bullpen_fatigue stress warning. SD batters have limited and mostly below-average BvP vs Buehler (Tatis Jr. shrunk 0.685, Andujar shrunk 0.638). Edge barely positive (+0.36pp) but outside staking band. SKIP correctly applied.

CHW @ SF.reasoning: CAP 7 (CHW bullpen worse, gap=+0.0099) and CAP 10 (pipeline marginal pick_prob assertion) both correctly fired, reducing from pre-cap B+ (3) to C (0). F2_xwoba_gap=0.035 is a legitimate signal, but CHW is a rebuilding roster (Antonacci, Montgomery, Meidroth). No SF lineup BvP data available (empty arrays). confidence_downgrade=True. Caps enforced correctly; non-staking.

STL @ CIN.reasoning: Strong directional signals: F1_xera_gap=2.06 (small sample asterisk, but F3=1986 provides dual confirmation satisfying CAP 5), SP edge 1.93 xERA agrees, PQI delta=+25.5 confirms CIN. CIN's HL bullpen is BETTER than STL's (gap=-0.0039), supporting the Stage 1/2 carry thesis (delta=0.1995). Pen strain HIGH (0.1149) shows CIN offense dangerous against STL pen. HARD CAP 1 fires on -1.57pp just-negative edge — barely misses the [4,15]pp staking window. Non-staking CONFIRM on sound direction.
